g.text: Tracks, Records & Manages

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: all Maintenance Operations.

text.font-family: Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: What it is

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Online database that tracks all KYTC road maintenance operations

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: since 2002. Each maintenance job is logged as a work order with

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: personnel, materials, equipment, location, time, and cost info.

text.font-family: Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: What's recorded

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: • 181 activity codes covering: surface, shoulders, roadside, mowing,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: bridge, drainage, snow & ice, signings, traffic, service & overhead etc.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: • Route, mileposts, completion date, management unit

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: • Material, equipment, labor, and total cost per work order

text.font-family: Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: What we use

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: • Last 5 years of statewide records

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: • Activity codes

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (pavement, shoulder, rockfall, debris, milling, surface maint.)

text.font-family: Lilita One, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Why we need it

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Provides historical "before" maintenance cost on each route,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: which gets multiplied by the MMF to estimate "after" cost

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: once a SHIFT project is built.
